# Cafe Hola — The Original Kapampangan Bakery

Cafe Hola (commonly known as Hola, Hola Bakery, or Hola Cafe) is the original Kapampangan bakery, born in Angeles City, Pampanga, Philippines. It sells freshly baked Creamcheese Ensaymadness, cheese bread bites, cheese rolls, pillow-soft bread, and Hola Coffee — genuine, authentic Kapampangan baked goods now available at 20 branches across Luzon.

Tagline: *Basta Hola, Manyaman!* ("With Hola, it's delicious!" — Kapampangan)

## Products

### Signature Bakery Items
- **Creamcheese Ensaymadness (Box of 6)** — The original. Freshly baked, cheesy, pillow-soft ensaymada generously filled with cream cheese. ₱440
- **Assorted Ensaymadness (Box of 6)** — A mix of Hola's ensaymada flavors. ₱420
- **Hola Ensaymaditas (Box of 15)** — Bite-sized ensaymada bars. ₱300
- **Milky Cheese Bread Bites (Box of 20)** — Soft, fluffy cheese bread bites. ₱333
- **Yema Cheese Bread Bites (Box of 20)** — Cheese bread bites with yema filling. ₱380
- **Assorted Cheese Bread Bites (Box of 20)** — Mixed flavors. ₱387
- **Spanish Bread (Box of 20)** — Classic Filipino Spanish bread. ₱347
- **Ube Spanish Bread (Box of 20)** — Spanish bread with ube filling. ₱347
- **Cheese Floss Rolls (Box of 6)** — Soft rolls topped with cheese floss. ₱400
- **Duo Rolls (Box of 6)** — Mixed cheese rolls. ₱373
- **Assorted Rolls (Box of 6)** — Variety of cheese roll flavors. ₱393

### Coffee & Beverages
- **Hot Beverages (12oz)** — Americano, Cafe Latte, Spanish Latte, Mocha, Caramel Macchiato, Cappuccino, White Choco Mocha, Milo Latte — all ₱172
- **Iced Coffee (16oz)** — Iced Latte, Iced Cappuccino, Iced Mocha, Iced Americano, Iced Spanish Latte and more — from ₱173
- **Holamazing Frappes (16oz)** — Chocolate, Mocha, Salted Caramel, White Choco Mocha — ₱187
- **Non-Coffee (16oz)** — Matcha, Cookies & Cream, Berry Fresh, Lemon Iced Tea — from ₱147

### All Day Breakfast & Mains
- Tapa & Kimchilog ₱333, Embonisa at Silog ₱260
- Kalderetang Baka ₱353, Spicy Pork Sisig ₱247, Pork Belly Kilayin ₱293
- Papa's Chicken Curry ₱327, Baked Chicken Adobo ₱293, Fried Chicken Roll ₱320
- Chicken Pesto Pasta ₱247

### Starters
- Spam Fries ₱200, Kangkoy ₱180, Beef Quesadillas ₱240, Parmesan Fries ₱167

## Flagship Location

**Don Juan Nepomuceno Ave., Nepo Center, Angeles City, Pampanga**
Open daily, 7:00 AM – 9:00 PM
Tel: 0945 150 2869

## All 20 Branch Locations

- **Pampanga**: Angeles City (flagship), SM Clark, SM Pampanga, San Fernando Downtown, Guagua
- **Metro Manila**: EDSA Shangri-La (Mandaluyong), SM City Fairview, SM South Mall, SM Grand Central (Caloocan), Ayala Malls Feliz
- **Bulacan**: SM Baliwag, SM Marilao
- **Rizal**: Antipolo
- **Central Luzon / Nueva Ecija**: Olongapo City, Cabanatuan, San Leonardo, SM Tarlac, Concepcion (Tarlac)
- **Batangas**: SM Sto. Tomas
- **Bataan**: SM Bataan

## How to Order

Cafe Hola does not operate a traditional online cart. All orders are placed through direct messages on social media:
- Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/TheCafeHola
- Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/cafe_hola2020/
- Foodpanda: https://www.foodpanda.ph/restaurant/bspe/hola-waltermart
- Inquiry form: /order/

## Franchising

Cafe Hola offers franchising opportunities for partners who want to bring a Hola branch to their city. Investment range, fees, and specific requirements are confirmed directly with the Hola team based on the target location. Inquiry form: /franchising/

## Brand

- **Full name**: Cafe Hola
- **Common names**: Hola, Hola Bakery, Hola Cafe, Cafe Hola Pampanga
- **Origin**: Angeles City, Pampanga, Philippines
- **Cuisine**: Filipino, Kapampangan
- **Specialty**: Ensaymada (Ensaymadness), cheese bread, pasalubong breads
- **Tagline**: *Basta Hola, Manyaman!*
- **Facebook**: TheCafeHola (35.6K+ followers)
- **Instagram**: @cafe_hola2020
- **Rating**: 4.2 stars on Google (13 reviews, flagship branch)
